arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
import json
from pathlib import Path

# Build a 2-week milestone plan aligned to Sprint 9 end (2026-04-20) + next week
base = datetime(2026,4,14,9,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai'))

milestones = [
  {
    "milestone_name": "Unblock API gateway timeout (T-412) and validate stability",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,16,18,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Sarah Chen",
    "success_criteria": "Infra timeout limits updated; gateway requests no longer timing out under baseline load; monitoring dashboard shows <1% timeout rate for 24h."
  },
  {
    "milestone_name": "Authentication flow feature complete (T-408)",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,18,18,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Sarah Chen",
    "success_criteria": "Login/signup endpoints integrated end-to-end; QA smoke tests pass; no P0/P1 auth bugs open."
  },
  {
    "milestone_name": "API rate limiting strategy finalized (T-409)",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,19,18,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Marcus Liu",
    "success_criteria": "Documented limits per tier; 429 handling guidelines published; rollout plan approved by PM/Tech Lead."
  },
  {
    "milestone_name": "Sprint 9 release readiness review",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,20,16,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Alex Zhang",
    "success_criteria": "All committed sprint items reviewed; remaining risks documented with owners; go/no-go decision recorded."
  },
  {
    "milestone_name": "Dashboard analytics widgets updated and verified (T-410)",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,23,18,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Emma Zhang",
    "success_criteria": "Widgets updated per spec; tracking events validated; QA regression passes on staging."
  },
  {
    "milestone_name": "Comprehensive error logging shipped (T-414)",
    "target_date": datetime(2026,4,25,18,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "owner": "Emma Zhang",
    "success_criteria": "Structured logs emitted for core APIs; error correlation IDs present; alerts configured for error spikes; verified in staging."
  }
]

out = {
  "plan_generated_at": datetime.now(ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat(),
  "window": {
    "start": datetime(2026,4,14,0,0,0,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat(),
    "end": datetime(2026,4,27,23,59,59,tzinfo=ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).isoformat()
  },
  "milestones": milestones
}

# P2 naming required: 20260414_*.json
path = Path('day22/20260414_milestone_plan_next_two_weeks.json')
path.write_text(json.dumps(out, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding='utf-8')
print(path)
print(out['plan_generated_at'])
PY

python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo

path='done.log'
now = datetime.now(ZoneInfo('Asia/Shanghai')).replace(microsecond=0)
forced = now.replace(year=2026, month=4, day=14)
ts = forced.isoformat()
entry = f"[DONE] {ts} | risk_register_update | Added R-006 risk: API rate limiting impact on Q2 launch (probability=Medium, impact=High)."
with open(path,'a',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(entry+'\n')
print(entry)
PY
